'''Bangor''' was the pet [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] of [[Tahiri Veila]] during her childhood as a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] on the desert [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Biography==
He was an orphan and was found wandering alone in the desert shortly after [[Sliven]] adopted [[Tahiri Veila]] following the deaths of her parents [[Tryst Veila|Tryst]] and [[Cassa Veila]] during a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] raid on their [[Moisture farm/Legends|moisture farm]]. Like many other [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]], he formed a deep bond with his owner. However, unlike many other Tusken Raiders, Tahiri gave him a name. Bangor understood both [[Tusken/Legends|Tusken]] and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]].

{{Creature-stub}}

*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Promises]]'' {{1st}}
